description:
Black to answer the monkey jump! Do not play some risky ko please (if you don't want to get this wrong:-) )

Wow my 100th problem, what to say here.... I still remember my first one, made while learning deutsch vocabulary.. my first strange, my most discutable (black to draw a house :) ), my first 6d, my best (Go go dream I think :) ), my first bad I had to deactivate... many problems, every made by myself, mostly after getting out of bed or observing or playing some game. Some problems I made might not be very cool, but I had fun while making all my problems and I hope you had fun while solving some of them.

I love this site and am looking forward to my 1000th problem in something like 20 years! :-)
